purpose: Executable verification contract for the active unit.
passCriteria: Failures are recorded as recovery, not success.
The active unit has an exact-candidate adjudication receipt matching its risk route.
failClosed: If a command is missing, never ran, or its parser is ambiguous, status MUST be RECOVERY_REQUIRED — never passed.

skillDoneSignalSchema.purpose: Machine-readable Definition-of-Done for the verify/impl skills (v1.60.0 — Ось 2). A skill's DoD must be expressed as >=1 structured done-signal below, not only prose Self-validation — so 'done' is a check, not a vibe. verify_dod_coverage.py enforces coverage of the required set and cross-checks every sentinel ref against the skill that writes it.

doneSignals.desc: durable exact-context review record for the current candidate
true only for an accepted verdict whose complete context key still matches
PASSED only while the adjudicated Verification Loop chain revalidates
suite actually ran and passed this session
fail-closed TDD evidence: real run output, not 'should pass'
durable exact-context security-review record for the current candidate
true only for an accepted security verdict; BLOCKED or UNVERIFIED remains closed
PASSED only while the security adjudication chain revalidates
fail-closed: bottleneck measured before/after, not guessed
regression test fails on the old code, passes on the fix
behavior-preserving: existing suite green before AND after
migration ran with a backup + a rollback path
generated hardening artifacts (health checks, runbook, limits)
generated IaC (Terraform/Helm/K8s) plus a documented plan/validate step the user runs before apply — /infra generates, it does not itself apply
